What phrase does your partner use that always makes you interrupt them?

What financial habit did you copy from your parents that you haven't shared with your partner?
What chore did your mom or dad always do that you now silently expect your future spouse to do?
Which set of parents calls more—yours or theirs? Who handles that pressure?

What mask do you put on when you're insecure?
What pattern from your family do you watch for in yourself?
